name: Dog Fest Meat Sticks With Vension (45G)
description: Meat sticks with wild taste. Training will be even more exciting now. These exotic meats have a great smell and taste. Dogs would do anything for it. Composition: duck, venison, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 28, crude fat 10, crude fiber 1, crude ash 5, moisture 21.
